name: Curried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon (or up to 1 1/2 tablespoons) Curry powder
1 cup Brown Basmati rice, well rinsed
1/2 cup Green peas, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size saucepan, bring broth and rice to a boil.
2. Cover and simmer for 40 minutes until water is absorbed and rice is tender. Drain if necessary.
3. Meanwhile, heat oil in a nonstick skillet and sauté onion until softened.
4. Stir in curry powder.
5. Add onion, raisins, and peas to the rice and heat through.
6. Garnish with nuts.
Makes 2 1/2 to 3 cups or 6 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 128; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 23g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 13g; FAT: 3g
